_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

reason: ALTCHA/altcha-lib 集成结论：Better Auth captcha 插件不支持 ALTCHA，需自定义；createChallenge/verifySolution 用法、回放保护、发码链路
Better Auth handler 直挂点 + 全局 body parser 关闭，ALTCHA 校验需插在 handler 前或插件层
emailOTP 插件 sendVerificationOTP 回调，方案A 在此层拦截校验 altcha
新增 ALTCHA_HMAC_SECRET 必填校验
登录页发码入口 handleSendOtp，嵌入 ALTCHA widget(auto=onsubmit) 并透传 payload
emailOtp.sendVerificationOtp 透传 altcha payload 的位置(fetchOptions)
后端 spec 入口：开发前检查 + 质量检查
widget 视觉需贴合蓝图登录卡片美学
